textByHash.110c43e572ba75b7fd702935e3eb1ef0694af9be: Armours and axes to suit your needs.
textByHash.1d561aa549fa2f1cabb5d4138115c56efac81d67: Indeed so, specially imported from the finest smiths around the lands, take a look at my wares.
textByHash.705eeb15c342fd55974a34b17d1e3a90b1d8ec54: A fine selection of blades for you to peruse, come take a look!
textByHash.930a0dee8c2163e4e033e51cd8fc772512cbb774: Ahhh, hello there. How can I help?
textByHash.b9dc0393bee417b944bd9b46d11cf8b76af78aa3: Imported weapons from the finest smithys around the lands!
textByHash.e3bf32e1dccd725f4885393453f7a563c5f20003: Ow my toe! That armour is heavy.
